args:
set -eu
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/measure-prefill.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/measure.prefill_path.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --proc-backend host --fs-backend host --http-backend host --json >/dev/null
fozzy trace verify "$trace_path" --strict --json >/dev/null
fozzy replay "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy ci "$trace_path" --strict --json >/dev/null
printf 'trace-measure-prefill-path\n'
